subject: Pursue Inspiration for Just $5 for 12 Weeks
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS6N9FB81HXJB838CwAAwENc0o/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

2014 RESOLUTION: INSPIRE YOUR PURSUITS

JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS6N9FB81HXJB838CwAAwENc0o/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Times Reader, 

The New York Times is the most engaging way to stay informed and
inspired. This New Year, resolve to stimulate your interests with
a Times Digital Subscription: just $5 for 12 weeks.

Reach your potential with unlimited access to the recently redesigned
NYTimes.com, delivering new features and a streamlined experience to
make the best news site on the web even better. Plus receive unlimited
access to all of our apps for smartphones and tablets.

Have the world's finest journalism at your fingertips anytime,
anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special offer:
just $5 for 12 weeks.

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS6N9FB81HXJB838CwAAwENc0o/sub2

*****

JUST $5 FOR 12 WEEKS

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBS6N9FB81HXJB838CwAAwENc0o/sub3

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user
of The New York Times. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times 
digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, 
Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile 
apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for 
the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the 
first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and 
your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of 
each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription 
is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms 
of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. 
Other restrictions and taxes may apply.  

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
